g.text: Loop architecture: Browser Use vs Rote
tokens per step = the whole page, every time;
learning only via a separate opt-in recorder
recorder captures every run -> memory warms the next one
Why Rote wins: each step pays tokens for what changed, not the whole page;
a stable context prefix makes provider caching actually hit; known flows replay
with zero model calls -- and expect/verify gates keep cheap from being wrong.
